nodes.name: pi/chaos.rs
nodes.summary: Deterministic pi-driven chaos generators: PiChaos for jitter, DeterministicJitter, and PiScheduler for scheduling decisions.

nodes.name: PiChaos
nodes.summary: Deterministic chaos generator seeded from pi digits for reproducible randomness.

nodes.name: DeterministicJitter
nodes.summary: Adds bounded deterministic jitter for precision-lane noise injection.

nodes.name: PiScheduler
nodes.summary: Scheduler that uses pi-chaos to spread tasks deterministically.

nodes.name: pi/constants.rs
nodes.summary: Pi-derived calibration constants and angular frequency tables used across precision lanes.

nodes.name: PiCalibration
nodes.summary: Per-precision-lane pi-based calibration scales (3/5/7 bit).

nodes.name: AngularFrequencyTable
nodes.summary: Precomputed angular frequencies indexed by lane and dimension.

nodes.name: pi/drift.rs
nodes.summary: Drift detector and quantization honesty checks for monitoring lane precision over time.

nodes.name: DriftDetector
nodes.summary: Detects quantization drift by tracking angular deviations against baseline.

nodes.name: QuantizationHonesty
nodes.summary: Reports whether observed quantization error matches advertised precision.

nodes.name: DriftReport
nodes.summary: Summary of drift measurements across lanes.

nodes.name: pi/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Pi-precision module root re-exporting angular, chaos, constants, drift submodules and exposing PiContext.

nodes.name: PiContext
nodes.summary: Aggregated pi-based runtime context combining calibration, scheduler, and drift detector.

nodes.name: precision/lanes.rs
nodes.summary: PrecisionLane enum (3/5/7 bit + FP), LaneConfig, and HardwareTarget abstraction.

nodes.name: PrecisionLane
nodes.summary: Discrete precision lanes mapping to bit widths used by the precision-aware engine.

nodes.name: LaneConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for active lanes including thresholds and graduation rules.

nodes.name: HardwareTarget
nodes.summary: Hardware target enum gating SIMD/NPU/CPU lane selection.

nodes.name: precision/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Precision module root re-exporting lanes, policy, quantizers, telemetry.

nodes.name: precision/policy.rs
nodes.summary: Graduation policy that promotes/demotes neurons between precision lanes based on observed metrics, plus LanedEventProcessor for reflex/embed/reason events.

nodes.name: GraduationMetrics
nodes.summary: Per-lane metrics (accuracy, latency) feeding graduation decisions.

nodes.name: GraduationDecision
nodes.summary: Decision variants: promote, demote, hold.

nodes.name: GraduationPolicy
nodes.summary: Implements graduation logic using thresholds and stability windows.

nodes.name: LanedEventProcessor
nodes.summary: Dispatches Reflex/Embed/Reason events into the appropriate precision lane.

nodes.name: ProcessResult
nodes.summary: Event processing outcome variants (Reflex/Embed/Reason).

nodes.name: precision/quantizers.rs
nodes.summary: Per-lane quantizers (3-bit, 5-bit, 7-bit) producing QuantizedBlock and a dispatching LaneQuantizer enum.

nodes.name: QuantizedBlock
nodes.summary: Quantized data block carrying scale, zero point, and packed values.

nodes.name: Quantizer3Bit
nodes.summary: 3-bit lane quantizer with pi-based scaling.

nodes.name: Quantizer5Bit
nodes.summary: 5-bit lane quantizer with pi-based scaling.

nodes.name: Quantizer7Bit
nodes.summary: 7-bit lane quantizer with pi-based scaling.

nodes.name: LaneQuantizer
nodes.summary: Discriminated dispatch over the three lane quantizers.

nodes.name: precision/telemetry.rs
nodes.summary: LaneStats and LaneTelemetry tracking per-lane throughput, accuracy, and transitions over time.

nodes.name: LaneStats
nodes.summary: Running statistics for a single precision lane.

nodes.name: LaneTelemetry
nodes.summary: Aggregated telemetry across all lanes with transition history.

nodes.name: LaneTransition
nodes.summary: Records a single lane transition (from -> to with reason).

nodes.name: TransitionReason
nodes.summary: Why a lane transition occurred (accuracy drop, latency budget, manual override).

nodes.name: predictor/lowrank.rs
nodes.summary: Low-rank neuron activation predictor implementing the Predictor trait with calibration and statistics tracking.

nodes.name: LowRankPredictor
nodes.summary: Low-rank predictor: tiny U/V matrices forecast which FFN neurons activate.

nodes.name: predictor/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Predictor trait, DensePredictor baseline, PredictorStats, and re-export of LowRankPredictor.

nodes.name: Predictor
nodes.summary: Trait for predicting active neuron indices from an input vector.

nodes.name: DensePredictor
nodes.summary: Baseline predictor that activates all neurons (dense ground truth).

nodes.name: PredictorStats
nodes.summary: Recall, precision, and sparsity stats for a predictor.

nodes.name: sparse/ffn.rs
nodes.summary: Sparse feed-forward network using predictor outputs to compute only active neurons via the configured Backend.

nodes.name: SparseFfn
nodes.summary: Sparse FFN layer wiring W1/W2 with activation type and backend-driven sparse matmul.

nodes.name: sparse/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Sparse module defining FeedForward trait, SparseFfn re-export, and SwiGLUFfn implementation.

nodes.name: FeedForward
nodes.summary: Trait abstracting over sparse and dense feed-forward implementations.

nodes.name: SwiGLUFfn
nodes.summary: SwiGLU FFN variant with paired gate/up projections.

nodes.name: backend_simd_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for CPU backend SIMD kernels (dot product, ReLU/GELU/SiLU, AXPY, sparse matmul).

nodes.name: tests/common/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Shared test helpers: random vectors, FFN/predictor/model factories, calibration data generators.

nodes.name: model_loading_tests.rs
nodes.summary: GGUF parsing and model structure integration tests.

nodes.name: sparse_inference_tests.rs
nodes.summary: End-to-end sparse inference pipeline integration tests (sparse vs dense, calibration, batching).

nodes.name: tests/property/mod.rs
nodes.summary: Proptest-based property tests for sparse inference invariants.

nodes.name: tests/README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation describing the test layout (unit/integration/property) for sparse inference.

nodes.name: predictor_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Unit tests for LowRankPredictor and DensePredictor behavior.

nodes.name: quantization_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Unit tests for INT8/INT4 quantization roundtrip and edge cases.

nodes.name: sparse_ffn_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Unit tests for SparseFfn and SwiGLUFfn correctness against dense baselines.
